context_database-select-info: Stream will be placed at the database root
context_field-name: May contain lowercase Latin letters, numbers, and dashes, and be from {{min}} to 63 characters in length. The first character must be a letter and the last cannot be a dash.
context_meter-mode: Choice of pricing mode for the data stream. [Read more](https://yandex.cloud/en/docs/data-streams/pricing) about the pricing rules
context_shards-write-quota: The maximum allowed write speed per segment. [Read more]( https://yandex.cloud/en/docs/data-streams/concepts/glossary#shard-thoughput) about segment throughput
context_throughput-info: Total throughput: up to {{speed}} (calculated using the formula: segment throughput * number of segments)
context_throughput-info-range: Total throughput: from {{from}} to {{to}} (calculated using the formula: segment throughput * number of segments)
context_auto-partitioning: Dynamic scaling of the topic depending on the write speed. [Documentation](https://ydb.tech/docs/en/concepts/topic#partitioning)
context_auto-partitioning-mode-restricte: Autopartitioning cannot be enabled with size storage mode
context_shards-info: The number of shards cannot be reduced
context_auto-partitioning-stabilization-: The period of time after a load change when the number of segments will change
context_auto-partitioning-up-utilization: The threshold at which the number of segments increases
context_data-storage-options: Data storage limits: by storage [time](https://yandex.cloud/ru/docs/data-streams/pricing#time-limit), by storage [volume](https://yandex.cloud/en/docs/data-streams/pricing#storage-limit)
context_data-storage-options-restricted: Size storage mode cannot be enabled with autopartitioning
context_data-storage-note-one: The last {{total}} GB ({{size}} GB x {{count}} segment) of data will be stored for 7 days
context_data-storage-note-many: The last {{total}} GB ({{size}} GB x {{count}} segments) of data will be stored for 7 days
confirm_auto-partitioning-message: The Kafka protocol does not support topic auto-partitioning. If you enable auto-partitioning, you will not be able to work with the topics you create using the Kafka protocol. You can not disabling auto-partitioning for a specific topic.
error_name-regex: Can contain lowercase Latin letters, numbers, and dashes. The first character must be a letter, and the last character cannot be a dash.
error_min-length: Value can't be shorter than {{count}} characters
error_max-length: Value can't be longer than {{count}} characters
error_min-number: Value must be an integer no less than {{count}}
error_max-number: Value must not be greater than {{count}}
error_less-than-number: This value must be an integer less than {{count}}
error_more-than-number: This value must be an integer greater than {{count}}
